prompt: 把我刚才这个研究流程沉淀成一个skill
expected: Classifies the skill, checks duplicates, creates a self-contained skill under .claude/skills, and updates indexes.
Routes person perspective output to perspective-library/[person-name]-perspective and updates the perspective index.

prompt: 我不想再用某个人物视角了，请归档它
expected: Moves the perspective to _archive/deprecated/perspectives, updates perspective-library/INDEX.md, and validates the active router.
